Islas del Pacífico, Salud de la población nativa de
Pacific Islander Health
Salud de los nativos de Hawaii y de las islas del Pacífico
Native Hawaiian and Pacific Islander Health
metadata.dc:description: Every racial or ethnic group has specific health concerns. Differences in the health of groups can result from: Genetics Environmental factors Access to care Cultural factors On this page, you'll find links to health issues that affect Native Hawaiians and Pacific Islanders.
